sentences.text: Let me just get my screen ready.
I'm doing great, thank you, how are you?
This week is kind of flying by, which, honestly, I love, so…
That is… it does… I feel like sometimes when I'm in the weeks…
I'm in… I'm in a meeting right now.
When I'm in the weeks, it feels like they move like molasses, but then, yeah, like, as far as, like, zooming out and looking at the whole year, it feels like time is flying quicker than ever.
So anyway, yes, I'm doing alright.
Okay, so you're in Minnesota, right?
Oh, wait, no, you are in Florida, I think I said?
Okay, I'm in Austin, Texas, but I… I will always feel like I'm slightly doing a disservice in not being closer to the beach, so I… love that you are close to a beach, and I can vicariously for you.
Well, I appreciate you hopping on today to talk.
I guess, was there anything in particular that piqued your interest in taking the call, or just open to hearing new things?
I'm just open to hearing new things.
I think Jack had called a couple of times, so…
Well, I appreciate you hopping on again.
I guess, going into 2026, do you have any big marketing initiatives or, like, anything that's kind of new for y'all?
We don't know yet, because we're still in the planning stages.
Okay, so when it comes to the…
How many do y'all have claimed and owned?
It looked like y'all were posting on a few of them.
Oh, we have a total of 29 hotels.
Or is that a different marketing.
Well, this is the… the hotel that I'm responsible for is in Epos.
Got it, okay, okay, so you just see… you just oversee one… the marketing for one hotel?
Well, unfortunately, we probably can't work together.
Do y'all use, like, a property management software or anything like that?
Okay, okay, yeah, what a bummer!
Alright, so unfortunately, our tool is specific to multifamily, so we integrate with, like, Yardi, or… Entrata, that sort of thing, to automate the Google business profile.
So, it sounds like there's another marketing contact that handles all of that?

Well, I am so sorry to waste a few minutes of your day, but yeah, unfortunately, we can't do anything on the hotel side of things, so… Would you… Like, the property that I had pulled up was, Altitude Residences.
It looks like someone's posting on there doing something.
Do you know who might be the marketing contact who oversees those?
I don't even know what altitude is.
I wouldn't know what it was either if I covered what… I covered the hotel side.
That would not make any sense.
Well, no, I don't… I'm not just familiar… I don't think we have that in our family.
That doesn't run in our family.
That is very strange, but y'all are based out of Minnesota?
Yes, but I don't know which one you're talking about.
Yeah, so this is the one that I had pulled up.
And this isn't… This isn't y'all's.
Yeah, can you go… can you just pull it up a second?
Csm Corporation, Cause… I believe I pulled it from…
Okay, yeah, it does… is this Jordan Avenue?
Yes, so it does look like this is in the portfolio.
Based on the website, unless I'm looking at the wrong one.
Yeah, but there's different… we have different entities, so you have… that's… this is residential.
Yes, no, I completely understand that you're not the right contact, but I just wanted to make sure that, yes, that this was, in fact, one of y'all's residential properties on the.
Well, Yeah, I guess… I guess we will just try and reach out to another marketing contact, so there are different marketing contacts underneath.
Okay, and just given, you know, that it looks like someone is trying to manually update them, do you know who I might…
Well, I really appreciate you hopping on.
So sorry that this, yeah, that we can't work together, but, I hope you have a lovely rest of your day.
